text: The happiness of your life depends on the quality of your thoughts.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Only those who know their goal can find the way.
author: Laozi

text: The hardest thing in life is not to fight when everything is fighting against you.
author: Franz Kafka

text: Nothing in the world is as powerful as an idea whose time has come.
author: Victor Hugo

text: It is not enough to know; one must also apply. It is not enough to will; one must also act.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

text: Man is the measure of all things.
author: Protagoras

text: The limits of my language mean the limits of my world.
author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

text: The purpose of life is to be happy.
author: Dalai Lama

text: Carpe diem - Seize the day!
author: Horace

text: Tempus fugit - Time flies!
author: Unknown

text: Ars longa, vita brevis - Art is long, life is short.
author: Unknown

text: Memento mori - Remember that you are mortal.
author: Unknown

text: Per aspera ad astra - Through hardships to the stars.
author: Unknown

text: Ad astra per aspera - To the stars through difficulties.
author: Unknown

text: Dum spiro, spero - While I breathe, I hope.
author: Unknown

text: In vino veritas - In wine, there is truth.
author: Unknown

text: Sic transit gloria mundi - Thus passes the glory of the world.
author: Unknown

text: Live every day as if it were your last.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Happiness often arises from attention to small things, unhappiness often from neglecting small things.
author: Wilhelm Busch

text: The journey is the destination.
author: Confucius

text: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: The secret of success lies in working where others stop dreaming.
author: Thomas A. Edison

text: Everything you want to achieve in life begins with the courage to try.
author: Mary Kay Ash

text: Contentment is the philosopher's stone that turns everything it touches into gold.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Life is not about having good cards, but about playing a poor hand well.
author: Robert Louis Stevenson

text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

text: Live in the moment and enjoy every second.
author: Unknown

text: Don't worry about things you can't control.
author: Unknown

text: Life is too short to be unhappy.
author: Unknown

text: Let go of what weighs you down and focus on what makes you happy.
author: Unknown

text: Believe in yourself and your abilities—you are stronger than you think.
author: Unknown

text: Find beauty in everything you do and be grateful for what you have.
author: Unknown

text: Happiness lies in the little things—be it a smile, a hug, or a beautiful sunset.
author: Unknown

text: Be kind to yourself and others—it costs nothing but can mean everything.
author: Unknown

text: Every day is a new opportunity to enjoy life and achieve something.
author: Unknown

text: Happiness is the only thing that doubles when shared.
author: Unknown
